title: Telangana CM exhorts SHG women to establish super markets, logistic parks and godowns
content: Telangana CM lays foundation stone for 8,000 buildings exclusively dedicated for women SHG activities

title: President Droupadi Murmu confers Padma awards
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Home Minister Amit Shah and other Ministers were present during the Civil investiture ceremony at Rashtrapati Bhawan

title: Karnataka’s hijab row: A rollback, at last
content: The Congress government in Karnataka lifts the 2022 order that banned faith markers, including hijab, in schools

title: 60 armoured units among 477 new vehicles added to Manipur police fleet
content: Chief Minister Yumnam Khemchand Singh flags off 477 newly acquired vehicles of State police, including 60 bulletproof Rakshak vehicles, 10 mine-protected vehicles, and five heavy machine repair vehicles.

title: Karnataka moves towards faster, reliable emergency care with launch of government-owned 108 command centre
content: The initiative seeks to strengthen emergency medical response services through a unified, technology-driven platform integrating ambulance dispatch, emergency helplines, and healthcare coordination.

title: Mahatma Gandhi University confers honorary doctorate on Mammootty
content: Nadaswaram maestro Thiruvizha Jayashankar and vascular surgeon Dr. N. Radhakrishnan also receive the honours

title: MP Debasish Samantaray quits BJD, steps down as member of Rajya Sabha, likely to join BJP
content: With Mr. Samantaray’s resignation, the BJD’s strength in the Rajya Sabha will come down to five MPs; in a letter to party chief Naveen Patnaik, he alleged that he was ‘systematically belittled’ within the BJD

title: Leopard rescued without tranquiliser from toilet at S.V. Veterinary University, Tirupati
content: The nearly one-year-old female was caught without tranquilising and moved to the Animal Rescue Centre at the S.V. Zoological Park for observation

title: Opposition slams fresh fuel price hike, Kharge asks ‘who benefits’, Rahul calls Modi ‘inflation man’
content: Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) convenor Arvind Kejriwal questions why India is not sourcing cheaper crude oil from Russia and Iran.

title: Pathanamthitta native appointed Peace Commissioner in Dublin
content: Also serving as Secretary of the Mar Thoma Church in Ireland, she has been residing in Dublin for the past 25 years with her husband, John Thomas

title: Karnataka Congress office bearers who missed SIR conclave will be stripped of their posts: D.K. Shivakumar
content: Since Sunday (May 24, 2026), the Congress is hosting a conclave strategising its move ahead of the commencement of SIR from June 20. The party fears that its voter base will be targeted during SIR for deletion of votes

title: Gujarat signs MoU with Meta to deliver 20 government services via WhatsApp
content: The initiative builds on Gujarat’s existing digital service ecosystem, including One Day Governance, Jan Seva Kendras and village-level service delivery mechanisms.

title: Telangana secures ₹13,600 crore refinancing deal for Hyderabad Metro Phase-I
content: The refinancing comes after Telangana government, through HMRL, acquired 100% stake in L&T Metro Rail (Hyderabad) Limited from Larsen & Toubro Limited, making Hyderabad Metro a fully government-owned strategic public transport asset

title: Girls shouldn’t give up education due to lack of sanitary napkins, gender-segregated toilets in schools: Supreme Court
content: The observation came after the Centre said its January 30 judgement directing authorities to provide free sanitary napkins to girl students and functional, gender-segregated toilets at schools has led to galvanisation of efforts in all States and Union Territories

title: Don’t take it so sentimentally, CJI tells lawyer complaining of online ‘distortion’ of the ‘cockroach’ remark
content: There’s no grave urgency to list plea seeking a probe into the activities of the Cockroach Janta Party and fake law degrees, the CJI says

title: T.N. CM Vijay instructs officials to take continued legal action on Mekedatu dam issue
content: With the proposed bhoomi pooja by the Karnataka government for the construction of the Mekedatu dam, Mr. Vijay held a consultative meeting to uphold Tamil Nadu’s rights, an official release said

title: Telangana CM expresses concern over Centre not procuring food grains at MSP
content: Families affected by the Musi rejuvenation project would be provided houses in the same vicinity, says Telangana CM Revanth Reddy

title: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah heading to Delhi on May 26
content: Though Congress general secretary in charge of Karnataka Randeep Singh Surjewala told presspersons in Bengaluru that it would be a consultation meeting ahead of the elections to Rajya Sabha and vacancies that would arise in Karnataka Legislative Council, speculation on leadership issue has refused to die down

title: Twisha Sharma death case: Supreme Court backs CBI probe, asks media to exercise restraint
content: Court asks the media to avoid recording statements of persons ‘who are likely to be potential witnesses/accused and unnecessarily pre-judge outcome on certain issues which have to be probed’

title: Fort Kochi health circle office gets an aesthetic image makeover thanks to dedicated staff
content: Gone are the waste piles, replaced instead with artistic installations fashioned from discarded materials, spotlessly clean premises, and the office building itself sporting a fresh coat of paint

title: Chandrababau Naidu unveils MSME growth plan; cites ₹23 lakh crore investment, 23 lakh jobs in 23 months
content: Naidu says the government is rewriting its economic planning to move at ‘jet speed’, in step with what the Gen Z and Gen Alpha generations want

title: Naga body protests in Manipur capital Imphal demanding release of six civilians
content: In the memorandum, the organisation demanded immediate action against armed Kuki militants allegedly involved in the abduction of six Naga civilians.

title: Kapurthala jail clash: 31 inmates booked for rioting, arson
content: While two inmates were injured in the clash, another sustained injury after he was hit by a teargas shell

title: Teenage boy stabbed to death near Madurai Meenakshi Temple
content: Armed gang inflicted multiple injuries on the minor to take revenge for assaulting a shopkeeper over an altercation in April

title: Fuel prices in Kerala rise by around ₹8 in less than a fortnight
content: Though the price of both petrol and diesel rose by around ₹2.85 and ₹2.86 respectively across the State, the actual retail prices varied across districts

title: Nirmala Sitharaman urges focus on Fuel, Fertiliser, Forex; hits out at critics for peddling pessimism
content: Stating that India's policy response has been calibrated to preserve domestic growth, FM said the cut in diesel and petrol excise duties will lead to a revenue impact of ₹1 lakh crore

title: 62-year-old man arrested for sexually harassing girl in Villupuram
content: According to the police, the accused reportedly asked the 11-year-old girl to buy a snack from a local eatery on Saturday before sexually harassing her

title: ‘Mantri Pradhan’ should resign, ‘Pradhan Mantri’ owes answers: Congress on CBSE glitches
content: Jairam Ramesh said the CBSE introduced an On-Screen Marking (OSM) system for Class 12 board examinations, which has thrown into chaos the academic futures of lakhs of children across the country

title: Eight killed in Ambenali as car falls into gorge
content: According to the police, the accident occurred when the car driver misjudged the road and fell into an eight-hundred-foot-deep gorge

title: Centre defends on-screen marking for CBSE Class 12 answer sheets, reduces re-evaluation fee
content: Union Secretary of School Education Sanjay Kumar and CBSE Chairman Rahul Singh say the system will improve evaluation and transparency. Re-evaluation cost has been reduced to ₹100 per answer sheet

title: ‘Is this Tamil Nadu or Uttar Pradesh?’ Udhayanidhi, EPS question TVK government over law and order
content: Mr. Udhayanidhi alleged that Tamil Nadu had witnessed 25 murders, four cases of double murder, and 19 incidents of sexual assault in the past 15 days

title: Petrol, diesel price hike an adjustment to global crude surge, says Nadendla Manohar
content: The Civil Supplies Minister says the rise follows the surge in global crude prices over the West Asia tensions

title: Road blockade in Vellore against TVK functionary who asked ‘₹1 lakh per month’ bribe from brick kiln operators
content: The TVK functionary and a few party cadre reportedly demanded each brick kiln operator to pay ₹1 lakh every month to run their units smoothly without any political interference.

title: ‘Mehangai manav’ strikes again: Rahul slams PM on fuel hike
content: Petrol and diesel prices were raised by ₹2.61-2.71 per litre on May 25, marking the fourth increase in less than two weeks as state-owned fuel retailers continued to pass on rising international oil prices to consumers

title: Thoothukudi schoolgirl sexual assault and murder case: Man gets death penalty on two counts
content: The girl had gone missing in a scrub forest area around 250 metres from her residence on the evening of March 10; she was found murdered the next day

title: Kolkata Police officers under ED scanner in land grab case
content: Investigators suspect that the syndicate operated through intimidation and misuse of police influence

title: Supreme Court issues notices to Centre on PIL seeking ban on employment of children in orchestras, spas
content: Massage parlours and spas currently fall under Part B of the child labour prohibition law, meaning the employment of adolescents (aged 14-18) is merely "regulated" rather than banned

title: For power sector, Kerala UDF govt’s Vision 2031 puts ‘energy transition and efficiency programme’ at centre stage
content: As per the roadmap, government proposes to roll out an ‘energy transition and efficiency programme’ for promoting the switch to renewables

title: Runway edge lights treated as runway in Air India Express take off accident in Oman
content: Oman’s air accident investigation body has reported that the occurrence was rated an accident and is being investigated.

title: 2024 assault case: Delhi Court convicts Congress leader Alka Lamba
content: The Court said it will hear the arguments on Alka Lamba’s sentencing in police assault case on June 5, 2026

title: Apiculture farmers in Karnataka hit by low budgetary allocation
content: Low budgetary allocation has forced the department to provide only two to three beekeeping boxes to farmers instead of providing minimum 10 boxes to each under the State Apiculture Development Scheme.

title: Padma Awards 2027 nominations invited online; SETVIS sets June 3 deadline for documents
content: The Ministry of Home Affairs seeks entries through the Rashtriya Puraskar Portal; in Visakhapatnam, SETVIS asks applicants to send a photocopy, biodata and booklet to its office by June 3

title: Caste-iron control: The threat of Rajasthan’s caste panchayats
content: Extrajudicial panchayats in Rajasthan use the age-old tool of social ostracisation combined with extortionary fines to control communities. Sreeparna Chakrabarty reports on how the Rajasthan High Court has taken note of this parallel justice system within each caste, the victims’ plight, and lack of a law that targets the social evil

title: Central Railway conducts fire safety seminar for TTEs in Solapur
content: Officials emphasised the absolute necessity of maintaining alertness during duty hours and having proper knowledge of firefighting equipment

title: Akhilesh targets UP govt over power situation
content: Only family members could understand the plight of the elderly, the sick, children, and women struggling with shortages of water and electricity in the extreme heat, Akhilesh Yadav says

title: Odisha bars labour work during peak heat hours
content: Field-level officials have also been instructed to remain vigilant and spread awareness among contractors and workers to prevent any untoward incidents caused by extreme heat conditions

title: NEET paper leak case: Court sends accused Manisha Havaldar to six-day CBI custody
content: According to the CBI, Ms. Havaldar, employed with the Seth Hiralal Saraf Prashala in Pune, was another key accused who was the source for the leak of NEET-UG 2026 physics questions.

title: Bihar CM hails CBSE’s decision to include Maithili in curriculum
content: ‘Inclusion of the Maithili language in the CBSE curriculum from class 1 up to the secondary level is a matter of pride for Mithila’s cultural identity and linguistic glory,’ Bihar Chief Minister Samrat Choudhary said

title: ‘Needless fuss’: Kerala CM defends posting former State poll chief Rathan Kelkar as his Secretary
content: Satheesan says neither CPI(M), which was in power earlier, nor BJP had found fault with Kelkar’s service as Chief Electoral Officer (Kerala)

title: So sad the NTA has not learnt its lesson, SC reacts to NEET-UG 2026 paper leak
content: SC issues notice to Ministry of Education, NTA, others on pleas to ‘replace or fundamentally restructure’ the NTA, make it answerable to the Parliament

title: Another Setback For AIADMK, Three MLAs Cross Over To Vijay's TVK
content: The MLAs met Tamil Nadu minister Aadhav Arjuna, who is also a key aide of Vijay, sources said. Accompanied by Arjuna, the MLAs then went to meet the Speaker and handed their resignation, which got accepted.

title: 8 Killed As SUV Falls Over 1,000 Feet In Gorge In Maharashtra's Raigad
content: The police suspect that the accident occurred after the driver lost control of the vehicle in the ghat area, following which it plunged into the gorge.

title: 300 Tourists Stranded Mid-Air After Technical Issue Halts Gulmarg Gondola
content: The cable car service, popularly known as Gondola, came to a sudden halt due to a technical fault, trapping tourists inside multiple cabins for a brief period and causing panic among visitors.

title: 19-Year-Old Charged For Drag Racing, Performing Car Stunts In Hyderabad
content: The accused, identified as Rehan, was allegedly driving a Honda City at high speed when police attempted to stop the vehicle during a late-night checking drive.

title: NDTV Nava Punjab Summit Live Updates: Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann, Key Ministers To Lay Out State's Vision
content: NDTV Nava Punjab Summit Live: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Singh Mann, Chief Secretary KAP Sinha and DGP Gaurav Yadav are among the key figures speaking at the NDTV Nava Punjab Summit being held in Chandigarh today.

title: Man Gets Death Penalty For Sexual Assault, Murder Of Minor In Tamil Nadu
content: The POCSO Special Court convicted Dharma Muneeswaran and sentenced him to death by hanging on both counts of sexual assault and murder, 77 days after the crime.

title: BRS Alleges Illegal Granite Mining, Land Transfers Linked To Congress MP
content: The Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) has made serious allegations against Congress Rajya Sabha MP and Telangana Chief Minister's advisor Vem Narender Reddy, accusing him and his family of illegally acquiring lands.

title: Assam Uniform Civil Code Makes Live-In Relationship Registration Compulsory
content: The Bill also states that any child born out of live-in relationship will be considered the legitimate child of the couple.

title: Pregnant Woman Alleges Bengaluru Hospital Staff Filmed Her In Toilet
content: The incident, which occurred on May 21, 2026, has sparked intense scrutiny over patient privacy and security protocols at major medical facilities across the city.

title: Air India Express Plane To Kerala Hit Lights, Sustained Heavy Damage In Oman
content: While accelerating for takeoff, the aircraft collided with runway edge lights. Several lights were knocked out, and the nose gear was damaged.

title: 'Don't Be Sentimental': Chief Justice On Plea Against Cockroach Janta Party
content: The advocate on Monday mentioned before the Supreme Court a writ petition concerning the controversy surrounding the recent "cockroach" remarks.

title: Big Change In Karnataka? Inside Track On Siddaramaiah vs DK Shivakumar Tussle
content: The subject of discussion for the Delhi meeting, the 77-year-old Chief Minister said, is not known to him.

title: Stock Market Highlights, Sensex Today: Sensex Closes 1,000 Points Higher As Crude Oil Price Falls 5%
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: US crude fell over 8%, Brent down over 5% amid possibility of a US-Iran peace deal.

title: China's New Export Rules: Will Curbs Short Circuit India's $120 Billion Electronics Dream?
content: Just as India doubles down on manufacturing, China has tightened its grip on the very supply chains that power those factories.

title: 'Prices Have Hit Unimaginable Levels': N Sitharaman Says Focus On Three 'Fs'
content: Sitharaman defended the Centre's handling of rising fuel prices, saying the government had already taken a major revenue hit to shield consumers.

title: "Aabar Dekha Hobe": Indian Envoy's Farewell Note As Dhaka Stint Ends
content: He added the cooperation between two countries is critical to address shared challenges like climate change and environmental sustainability.

title: 'Daily assault of fuel loot not over yet': Oppn slams Modi govt for fourth hike in 10 days
content: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge has strongly criticized the Modi government for recent fuel price increases, alleging it burdens citizens despite stable international crude oil rates. He pointed to significant hikes in petrol and diesel prices over the past decade, contrasting them with the UPA era.

title: Pole vaulters carry equipment on e-rickshaw after breaking national record - Watch
content: Hours after becoming joint national record holders, both athletes were seen travelling in an e-rickshaw with their poles and equipment loaded alongside them after leaving Birsa Munda Stadium.

title: K'taka CM change soon? Decision may be taken in 2-3 days - Report
content: A Karnataka leadership change decision is imminent within days following crucial Congress meetings. Chief Minister Siddaramaiah met with party leaders amid ongoing speculation about a potential shift. Discussions also covered Rajya Sabha and MLC polls, and a minor cabinet reshuffle has already occurred, with portfolios being reassigned.

title: USCIS clarifies Green Card policy for H-1B visa holders and high-skilled workers
content: USCIS has clarified a new Green Card policy. This policy could have required many to apply from abroad. However, USCIS now states that applicants with national interest or economic benefit may continue their current process. This offers relief to many H-1B visa holders and tech industry workers. The agency is reasserting its interpretation of immigration law.

title: 'Detect, delete and deport': BJP govt opens first migrant holding centre in Bengal
content: West Bengal's BJP government has launched its 'detect, delete and deport' policy, opening a holding center in Malda for illegal foreign nationals. Nine suspected Bangladeshi nationals are currently housed there, awaiting verification and legal procedures. This initiative aims to streamline the deportation process for apprehended individuals, as mandated by a new national law.

title: Ranveer Singh banned: FWICE issues directive over 'Don 3' dispute with Farhan Akhtar
content: FWICE has issued a non-cooperation directive against Ranveer Singh following his sudden exit from Farhan Akhtar's 'Don 3'. The complaint was filed through IFTDA, with Excel Entertainment reportedly seeking Rs 40 crore in compensation. The Producers Guild of India may also intervene to resolve the dispute.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
content: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

title: After attack on manager's house, Diljit Dosanjh’s Ludhiana home gets bomb threat email
content: Singer Diljit Dosanjh's Ludhiana residence has received a bomb threat via email, following an alleged attack on his manager's home. The 'Khalistan National Party' sent the email, also targeting the Ludhiana Mayor's residence and office. Police have been alerted and deployed to Dosanjh's unoccupied house. This comes after Dosanjh reportedly removed pro-Khalistan protestors from a Canadian concert.

title: South Mumbai hit-and-run: Speeding Mercedes rams into cops at Marine Drive; driver held
content: A speeding Mercedes crashed into a police checkpoint at Marine Drive early Sunday, critically injuring two constables. The 29-year-old driver, Nihal Solanki, was arrested after attempting to flee the scene. Police have seized the vehicle and are investigating the incident while the injured officers receive hospital treatment.

title: ‘Jana Nayagan’ release date out: Thalapathy Vijay film to hit screens before actor’s birthday
content: Thalapathy Vijay's final film, 'Jana Nayagan,' is reportedly eyeing a June 19, 2026 release, ahead of his birthday. Despite previous delays due to censor issues and an online leak, the producer assures the censor process is nearing completion. Fans eagerly await the official announcement for Vijay's grand worldwide theatrical farewell.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: 'We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system'
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: Russia's Oreshnik terrorised Ukraine but India has an even deadlier missile option
content: Russia's Oreshnik missile, capable of Mach 10 speeds and MIRV warheads, struck Kyiv in retaliation for a Ukrainian drone attack. This hypersonic threat overwhelms current air defenses. India's Agni-V, a comparable MIRV-equipped IRBM, boasts Mach 24 speeds and advanced features, enhancing its survivability and strike capability.

title: Can't get rid of dark spots, pigmentation this summer? Dermatologists reveal treatments that work
content: Seasonal sun exposure often leads to pigmentation issues like dark spots and uneven skin tone. Dermatologists recommend laser treatments, such as Q-switched Nd:YAG and pico-second lasers, to precisely target melanin. These advanced therapies offer minimal downtime and significant results, restoring radiant skin after a few sessions. Consistent sun protection and expert advice are crucial for long-lasting glow.

title: US-Iran war impact on India: FM stresses on 3Fs - fuel, fertilisers & forex; here’s why
content: Sitharaman also pointed out that apart from higher crude oil prices, fertiliser prices have reached “unimaginable” levels, while elevated gold prices are creating challenges on the external sector front.

title: Iran demands release of $12 billion frozen in Qatar before advancing US talks
content: Iran seeks immediate release of 12 billion dollars in frozen assets from Qatar. This is a key demand before starting talks with the United States. Iran wants all its frozen assets worldwide unfrozen eventually. Differences persist between Iran and the US over certain clauses in a potential agreement. The release of blocked assets remains a point of contention.

title: 'Give him time to splash some water on face': Gavaskar on Rishabh Pant using 'F' word
content: Lucknow Super Giants captain Rishabh Pant used a curse word in a post-match interview. This led to criticism. Former India captain Sunil Gavaskar defended Pant. He suggested broadcasters should give losing captains more time to recover. This would prevent such incidents. Pant's team had a poor IPL 2026 season. He also struggled with his batting performance.

title: Taylor Swift fans slam Travis Kelce’s chaotic NBA playoff antics
content: Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift sparked another online storm after their courtside appearance during the Eastern Conference Finals went viral. Fans reacted strongly to Kelce chugging beer and celebrating wildly during the game, with some calling his behavior “immature” and “embarrassing.” Others defended the Kansas City Chiefs star for simply enjoying himself. Swift was also dragged into the backlash as social media debates over the celebrity couple intensified.

title: Stock market: Which are the top gainers and losers on NSE & BSE today? Check list
content: Stock markets surged on Monday, with Sensex and Nifty crossing significant milestones. Easing West Asian tensions and falling crude oil prices fueled investor optimism, particularly after US President Trump indicated a deal with Iran was largely negotiated. Banking stocks led the rally, while global markets also saw gains.

title: 140 years old, only 18 cases in 2024: All about Negotiable Instruments Act
content: A surprising revelation surfaces as 2024 records show a mere 18 instances of cheque bounce nationwide, predominantly from Jharkhand and Uttar Pradesh. This significant drop brings into question the practicality of the Negotiable Instruments Act, 1881, a key element in the realm of commercial law.

title: Gold price today: Yellow metal rises; check 24K, 22K city-wise rates
content: Gold prices surged on Monday, buoyed by global market optimism stemming from potential US-Iran peace talks.  Retail rates in major Indian cities also climbed, with 22K, 24K, and 18K gold seeing gains. Analysts attribute this rise to a weaker US dollar and easing crude oil prices, signaling reduced inflationary fears and supporting precious metal markets.

title: Fuel price hike: FM says 'India can't afford fear mongering'; govt may lose Rs 1 lakh cr revenue
content: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman stated that reducing fuel excise duties would cost Rs 1 lakh crore, emphasizing India's need for confidence over fearmongering amidst rising petrol and diesel prices. She highlighted the resilience of India's domestic economy despite global pressures on fuel, fertilizer, and forex, urging focus on these "three Fs".

title: ‘Is this all we want from Sooryavanshi?’ Ex-India player slams Impact Player rule
content: Former India batter Sanjay Manjrekar voiced strong reservations about the IPL's Impact Player rule, fearing it hinders the holistic development of young cricketers like Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. He argued the rule creates one-dimensional players, limiting their exposure and preventing a full assessment of their all-round abilities. Manjrekar stressed that cricket should test players across disciplines for sustainable success.

title: Yash Dayal breaks silence on not being part of RCB: 'They haven’t removed me'
content: Yash Dayal said he is still part of Royal Challengers Bengaluru despite missing IPL 2026, insisting the decision was not his own. Dayal revealed he remains in touch with the franchise management and “DK bhaiya”. The pacer has been absent amid personal and legal controversies, but RCB have retained him under contract during their ongoing playoff campaign.

title: 'Share traits of destruction': Kharge on PM Modi and Trump's 'mutual appreciation'
content: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi and former US President Donald Trump, stating they share a similarity in "destruction" which fuels their mutual praise. This comes after Trump expressed his "love" for PM Modi and India during a call to the US ambassador in New Delhi.

title: 'Dark transit': How Gulf producers keep energy shipments moving despite Hormuz closure
content: Amidst Middle East conflict, UAE and Qatar's oil giants are employing "dark transits," switching off transponders in the Strait of Hormuz to maintain energy exports. Adnoc and Qatar have adapted with controlled fleets and discreet navigation, including shuttle runs and ship-to-ship transfers, to ensure cargo movements despite geopolitical risks and limited broadcast data.

title: Inside story of Gill's T20 redemption: 1000s of balls with middler bat and unlocking the 'V'
content: Dropped from India’s 2026 T20 World Cup squad, Shubman Gill returned to his home in Mohali determined to reinvent his T20 game. Through relentless training, minute adjustments and hours with a middler bat, Gill developed greater range, control and power, laying the foundation for his most complete and commanding IPL season yet.

title: Uganda detects two new Ebola cases in Kampala health facility; total cases rise to 7
content: Uganda has confirmed two new Ebola cases, including two health workers in Kampala, bringing the total to seven. These infections follow three reported on Saturday, involving a driver, a health worker, and a Congolese woman. The outbreak, caused by the rare Bundibugyo strain, is being closely monitored with strengthened infection control measures.

title: NFL trade rumors: Bengals linked to Dolphins’ $26m defensive star in blockbuster move
content: Fresh NFL trade rumors surrounding Miami Dolphins linebacker Jordyn Brooks are beginning to draw attention across the league. After an All-Pro season and 183 total tackles in 2025, Brooks has now been linked to the Cincinnati Bengals as the franchise continues searching for defensive upgrades. Here’s what insiders are saying about the speculation, Brooks’ $26.25 million contract, and why the situation could become one to monitor deeper into the 2026 offseason.

title: HasanAbi subpoena drama explained: Why US treasury targeted his Cuba trip
content: Hasan Piker is facing federal scrutiny after the U.S. Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control reportedly issued subpoenas connected to his March 2026 Cuba trip. Authorities are investigating whether participants violated U.S. sanctions laws through financial or travel-related activities involving Cuban government-linked entities. HasanAbi denied wrongdoing, saying, “we stayed at the right hotel btw.” The controversy quickly spread online, with creators and critics debating whether the political streamer could face serious consequences.

title: Why is the Iran deal still stuck? Hormuz, uranium, US blockade and the unresolved fault lines
content: Intense diplomatic efforts are underway to secure an agreement between the US and Iran, aiming to end the Middle East conflict, reopen the Strait of Hormuz, and ease energy market pressures. Despite claims of progress, significant disagreements persist over uranium enrichment, sanctions relief, and regional influence, leaving a final deal uncertain.

title: Delhi court convicts Alka Lamba in 2024 Jantar Mantar protest case
content: Former Congress MLA Alka Lamba has found herself at the center of controversy, as a Delhi court has convicted her in relation to the 2024 protest advocating for women's reservation at Jantar Mantar. Accusations of breaching prohibitory orders and hindering public officials led to her trial, to which Lamba staunchly contests the charges as fabricated.

title: New Lucknow and Kanpur expressway to drive property demand: Report
content: A new 63-km expressway connecting Lucknow and Kanpur is poised to invigorate real estate, particularly in peri-urban areas, by boosting connectivity and industrial movement. This strategically vital corridor, linking to the Ganga Expressway, is expected to spur demand for plotted developments and logistics parks.  The project promises enhanced regional integration and economic growth.

title: Coimbatore girl rape-murder: Cops caught grinning during media briefing
content: A senior Tamil Nadu police officer is facing backlash after a video showed her laughing before a press briefing on a brutal girl's rape-murder case. The clip sparked outrage, with many questioning the perceived insensitivity. This controversy follows similar criticism of a state minister for her demeanor during media interactions on the same tragic incident.

title: Tenant refusing to leave after lease expired? Here is what law says you can do
content: In India, landlords are required to adhere to proper legal channels when it comes to evicting tenants; any forcible eviction is prohibited and may result in severe repercussions. It's essential to have a written lease agreement and issue a formal eviction notice before resorting to legal proceedings.

title: Man kills brother, grandmother and uncle over land feud in Haryana
content: A shocking land dispute turned deadly in Ambala as a 22-year-old allegedly shot his elder brother, grandmother, and uncle dead, critically injuring his aunt.  The accused, Abhishek, reportedly opened fire during a heated argument over sand sale proceeds.  Police are actively searching for him and investigating the source of the weapon.

title: Watch: Kohli’s playful beard gesture to Gill goes viral before Qualifier 1
content: A heartwarming interaction between Virat Kohli and Shubman Gill before IPL 2026 Qualifier 1 has captivated fans. The duo shared a warm embrace and playful banter, with Kohli teasing Gill about his beard. This light-hearted moment precedes a crucial clash between Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans, highlighting the camaraderie between these batting stalwarts.

title: Major blow to AIADMK: 3 MLAs from Shanmugam–Velumani faction resign
content:
AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami

CHENNAI; MLAs S Jayakumar (Perundurai), Maragatham Kumaravel (Maduranthakam -sc) and P Sathyabama (Dharapuram - SC) on Monday submitted their resignation to Speaker J C D Prabhakar. They were among the 25 MLAs from C Ve Shanmugam- S P Velumani camp who voted in favour of Tamiliga Vettri Kahagam govt in the vote of confidence. Sources in the AIADMK said that the three MLAs decided to resign following a promise from TVK Chief Coordinator and Minister K A Sengottaiyan that they would be accommodated and fielded in their respective constituencies in the upcoming by-elections. Meanwhile, a couple of MLA from the rebel camp called on AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami as part of the ongoing reconciliation drive. Affirming this shift toward reunification, MLAs P Haribaskar (Anthiyur), S Mohan (Panruti) and S M Sugumar (Arcot) formally called on EPS at his Greenways Road residence

End of Article
